prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A large control panel mounted on a wall labeled "tsconfig.json". It has several controls: a rotary dial labeled "target" with positions from ES5 to ES2022 to ESNext (currently set to ES2022). Another dial labeled "module" with CommonJS and ESModule options. A row of toggle switches for "strict" (flipped ON, glowing green), "sourceMap" (ON), "declaration" (ON), "esModuleInterop" (ON). A digital display at the top shows the current configuration summary. LED indicators glow beside each active setting. A developer's hand adjusts the "target" dial. The panel has a satisfying retro-tech aesthetic.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
